output.summary: Classified as medium. Clear approach using MetroCity composable layers.
Read directive.md with CEO brief and MetroCity asset analysis.
Single project: build-time compositing script. Simplification: pre-compose at build time, not runtime. Builder: devon, Reviewer: sarah.

MetroCity frames are 32x32, 24 cols = 4 dirs x 6 frames. Critical: downscale 32x32 to 16x32. No typing/reading poses in MetroCity. 6+ files hardcode 16px width. Recommend build-time compositing with pngjs.
4 tasks: (1) copy assets + scaffold script, (2) frame extraction + direction mapping, (3) layer compositing + agent output, (4) registry wiring + integration verification.
Working on current branch (directive/game-ui-tmx-update). No worktree needed.
Work completed outside pipeline on game-ui-tmx-update branch. Runtime compositing in asset-loader.ts + build-time script compose-metrocity.ts. All 12 agents wired with appearance configs.
Verified: assets present, script complete, runtime compositing working, registry wired. Superseded by broader game-ui-tmx-update work.
Closed as completed — all deliverables present, work done on game-ui-tmx-update branch.
CEO approved. Directive superseded by game-ui-tmx-update branch work.
